title: Latifa El-Ghandouri
content:
People.ContactEmail lelghandouri@mtiplus.ca
Latifa El-Ghandouri is a paraprofessional with the Immigration Law Division in Montreal. She specializes in a wide variety of immigration matters, including temporary work permits, Labour Market Impact Assessment (LMIA), Certificates of Acceptance for Studies (CAQ) and study permits.
With over 15 years of experience as an immigration consultant, Latifa has received numerous awards for her continued involvement in her professional community. She was a member of the Board of Directors of the ICCRC for six years.
Latifa speaks fluent English, French and Arabic.
